download.excerpt: Mobile Edition Beta launches alongside a major Unfriend History overhaul, improved security systems, performance upgrades, and multiple stability fixes.
download.body:
For almost a year, Friends Remover has been ONE of the many extensions to help you get rid of your Roblox friends on PC. However, as a removal extension, we aren't really that special. Sure, we have unfriend history, background removals, and more, but I want something better. I want a bigger way to stand out maybe for users to use Friends Remover on mobile.

And that's where Friends Remover Mobile Edition comes in. We have been experimenting, and we are ready to release our beta version of Friends Remover on mobile!

Android
How does it work?

1. Go to your Play Store.
2. Search for "quetaa."
3. Download the app.
4. Go to our extension page by searching for "Chrome Web Store" and looking up "Friends Remover."
5. Click "Add to Chrome."

And boom! Now you have Friends Remover on your Android tablet or phone — anything Android. iOS support will be available soon!

added.moreInfo: Redesigned settings UI for mobile devices.
Swipe left or right to change friends on mobile.
AFK warning now appears as a toast notification.
Unfriend History entries can now be dismissed.
Logo changes when Unfriend History is open.
Rate limits sensitive actions and triggers captcha when needed.

fixed.moreInfo: Fixed history loading only local data instead of server data.
Fixed redirecting back to friends list.
Fixed headshots appearing incorrectly or not loading.
Fixed inactive friend detection and background removal issues.

improved.moreInfo: Made history UI match friends list design.
Removed extra options, now only shows View Profile.
Background sync now waits for API recovery before applying changes.
Dynamic captcha requirements based on removal size.
Background polling now scales with friend count.
Lower friend counts = higher quality avatars.

security.moreInfo: Added captcha to more sensitive actions.
Cannot cancel removal when fewer than 7 friends remain.

other.moreInfo: Settings now fully usable on mobile.
Added hamburger menu and sidebar navigation.
Toasts now slide from bottom instead of side.
